splits.dev: 32 questions used during prompt v3.x calibration (Runs 6-10).
splits.test: 68 hold-out questions added in Phase F.1 — never seen during calibration. All headline numbers in the study report are computed on this test set.

types.normal: Standard orientation question across the 7 historical categories (biais_marketing, realisme, decouverte, diversite_geo, passerelles, comparaison, honnetete).
types.adversarial: Designed to trigger hallucination — fake schools, fake reports, fake institutional documents. Used to measure honesty_rate.
types.cross_domain: Outside the cyber / data / IA domain (droit, médecine, archi, etc.) — tests whether the RAG admits its boundary cleanly.
